name: routine-optimizer-chain
description: Analyze user's daily routine, identify energy leaks, suggest micro-habits, and output redesigned morning/evening routines optimized for energy and productivity.

entry_inputs.name: routine_description
entry_inputs.description: User's current daily routine with morning and evening activities, timings, and pain points. Minimum 5 distinct activities.

entry_inputs.name: user_constraints
entry_inputs.description: Fixed constraints that cannot be changed (work start time, family obligations, commute duration, etc.)

entry_inputs.name: energy_baseline
entry_inputs.description: User's typical energy level throughout the day (e.g., 'low morning energy, afternoon crash, evening second wind')

entry_inputs.name: micro_habit_preferences
entry_inputs.description: Types of micro-habits user is open to (e.g., ['movement', 'breathing', 'hydration', 'mindfulness', 'journaling'])

terminal_outputs.name: clarified_routine
terminal_outputs.description: Structured representation of user's current routine with activities, timings, and transitions

terminal_outputs.name: energy_analysis
terminal_outputs.description: Per-activity energy impact assessment with reasoning and sequencing effects

terminal_outputs.name: identified_leaks
terminal_outputs.description: Energy leaks and inefficiencies ranked by severity and addressability

terminal_outputs.name: micro_habits_suggested
terminal_outputs.description: Prioritized list of micro-habits with starter and full sets, implementation details, and triggers

terminal_outputs.name: optimized_morning_routine
terminal_outputs.description: Redesigned morning routine with sequencing, timings, integrated micro-habits, and rationale

terminal_outputs.name: optimized_evening_routine
terminal_outputs.description: Redesigned evening routine with sequencing, timings, integrated micro-habits, wind-down period, and rationale

terminal_outputs.name: optimization_report
terminal_outputs.description: Complete analysis and recommendations in markdown format with before/after comparison, implementation plan, troubleshooting, and tracking template
